bootstrap.title: Frontend foundation aligned with TracAuto v2.
bootstrap.description: This bootstrap enables the common frontend stack: visual tokens, i18n, React Query, centralized HTTP client and folder structure for the access and context features.
bootstrap.sidebarDescription: This screen exists to validate that the slice 01 scaffold starts with the right architecture before building login, sign-up, context selector and refresh flows.

session.title: Decoupled session
session.body: The axios client injects the JWT from a session bridge and prepares automatic refresh through an HttpOnly cookie.

context.title: Multi-org context
context.body: The structure separates auth, context and shell so the app can respect the Session Snapshot and organization selector flow.

i18n.title: i18n from the first commit
i18n.body: All bootstrap copy lives in i18next with es-AR as the initial language and a controlled fallback.

layers.title: Layers ready to grow
layers.body: Features, stores, services, shared and modules are prepared to follow the backend standard without mixing responsibilities.

structure.title: Active layers
structure.services: HTTP, contracts, adapters and session helpers
structure.shared: UI, i18n, hooks, forms, errors and utilities

hero.subtitle: Manage fleets, workshops, insurance, rentals and more. Or simply track your personal car. All connected, all in real time.

modules.title: Everything your company needs
modules.subtitle: Specialized modules for every vertical in the vehicle ecosystem. Activate only the ones you need.

flota.title: Fleet Management
flota.desc: Complete vehicle, driver, route and preventive maintenance management.

concesionaria.title: Dealership
concesionaria.desc: Stock, sales, CRM and after-sales integrated in one platform.

taller.title: Workshop
taller.desc: Work orders, parts, online appointments and automated invoicing.

seguros.title: Insurance
seguros.desc: Policies, claims, inspections and comprehensive coverage tracking.

alquileres.title: Rentals
alquileres.desc: Availability, contracts, returns and real-time control.

movilidad.title: Mobility
movilidad.desc: Trips, drivers, passengers — Uber-like management for your operation.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.desc: Deliveries, optimized routes and live tracking for last mile.

b2c.title: Your car, always connected
b2c.subtitle: Always know where your vehicle is. Get alerts. Control everything from your phone.

gps.title: Real-time GPS tracking
gps.desc: Exact location of your vehicle, updated every 10 seconds.

alerts.title: Smart alerts
alerts.desc: Movement, speed, geofences — instant push notifications.

history.title: Trip history
history.desc: Review all trips and routes with stop and speed details.

status.title: Vehicle status
status.desc: Mileage, engine, battery and diagnostics from the app.

steps.title: Get started in 3 steps
steps.subtitle: From zero to live tracking in less than 5 minutes.

items.title: Sign up
items.desc: Create your account in less than 2 minutes. No credit card required.

items.title: Connect
items.desc: Add your vehicles and GPS devices to the platform.

items.title: Monitor
items.desc: Monitor everything from a single platform, in real time.

pricing.title: Plans for every need
pricing.subtitle: Start free and scale when you need to.

personal.name: Personal
personal.desc: Ideal for tracking your personal vehicle.

profesional.name: Professional
profesional.desc: For small fleets and growing businesses.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For large operations with specific needs.

items.quote: Since we implemented TracAuto, we reduced fuel costs by 30%. Real-time visibility changed our operation.
items.name: Carlos Mendez

items.quote: Claims management improved drastically. We have all vehicle information instantly, without calling the insured.
items.name: Laura Peralta

items.quote: I control my car from my phone. It notifies me if someone moves it. Simple, fast and gives me peace of mind every day.
items.name: Martin Garcia

cta.title: Start today. It's free.
cta.subtitle: No credit card. No commitment. Cancel anytime.
cta.ctaEmpresa: Are you a company? Register your organization

footer.brandDesc: Comprehensive vehicle management, telemetry and GPS tracking platform for businesses and individuals.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password
login.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is not enabled in this slice yet.

passwordRecovery.title: Recover your access
passwordRecovery.subtitle: Enter the email you used to create your account and we'll send you a link to choose a new password.
passwordRecovery.helper: For security reasons, we'll always show the same message even if the email does not exist.

success.title: Check your email
success.subtitle: If there is an account associated with {{email}}, you'll receive instructions to reset your password.
success.disclaimer: The link expires soon and can only be used once.

passwordReset.title: Create a new password
passwordReset.subtitle: Choose a secure password to regain access to your account.
passwordReset.tokenMissing: The recovery link is invalid or incomplete.
passwordReset.expirationHint: When you confirm the change, any previous session will be closed for security reasons.

success.title: Password updated
success.subtitle: You can now sign in with your new password.
success.sessionsHint: If you had active sessions on other devices, they were closed automatically.

emailVerification.title: Verify your email
emailVerification.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {{email}} to complete your registration.
emailVerification.expiredHint: The code sent to {{email}} has expired. You can request a new one from this screen.
emailVerification.helper: We sent the code to {{email}}. If you don't see it, check spam or resend it when the countdown reaches zero.
emailVerification.expirationHint: The code expires soon and only the latest one you received remains valid.
emailVerification.resendSuccess: We sent you a new verification code.

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
errors.passwordDigit: Password must contain at least one number

step1.title: What's your email?
step1.subtitle: You'll use it to sign in and receive notifications.

step2.title: Your identity document
step2.subtitle: We need to verify your identity to protect your account.

step3.title: Create your password
step3.subtitle: Choose a secure password to protect your account.

step4.title: What's your name?
step4.subtitle: Your name will appear on your profile and notifications.

success.title: Your account is ready!
success.subtitle: You can now start using TracAuto to track and manage your vehicles.

step1.title: Your contact details
step1.subtitle: Enter the details of the person who will be the main administrator.

step2.title: Create your password
step2.subtitle: Choose a secure password for your admin account.

step3.title: Your company details
step3.subtitle: Tell us about your organization to set up the workspace.

step4.title: Which modules do you need?
step4.subtitle: Select the modules for your company. You can change them later in settings.

success.title: Your company is ready!
success.subtitle: We've created the workspace for your organization.
success.inviteHint: You can invite collaborators from the admin panel.

invitacion.title: Accept invitation
invitacion.heading: You've been invited to join an organization
invitacion.noToken: The invitation link is invalid or incomplete.
invitacion.disclaimer: By accepting, your personal TracAuto account will still exist. You'll be able to use both your personal account and the organization from the same login.

success.title: You've joined the organization!
success.subtitle: You can now access it from the organization selector.

password.min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
password.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
password.digit: Password must contain at least one number.

nombre.required_for_new_registration: First name is required to create a new account.

apellido.required_for_new_registration: Last name is required to create a new account.

tipo_documento.required_for_new_registration: Document type is required to create a new account.

numero_documento.required_for_new_registration: Document number is required to create a new account.

refresh_token.not_blank_when_provided: Refresh token cannot be blank when provided.

errors.network: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
errors.HTTP_403: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.HTTP_500: Server error. We are working on it.

validation.failed: Review the form data and try again.

auth.cuenta_bloqueada: Your account is temporarily locked. Try again later.
auth.token_expirado: Your session has expired. Sign in again.
auth.token_invalido: Your session is no longer valid.
auth.token_requerido: A refresh token is required to continue.
auth.token_reutilizado: The session was invalidated for security reasons.
auth.email_duplicado: There is already an account with this email.
auth.sin_acceso_organizacion: You do not have access to this organization.
auth.password_reset_token_invalido: The recovery link is invalid or has expired.
auth.registro_verificacion_ticket_consumido: This verification link has already been used.
auth.registro_verificacion_expirada: The code has expired. Request a new one to continue.
auth.registro_verificacion_codigo_invalido: The code you entered is incorrect.
auth.registro_verificacion_reenvio_temprano: You must wait {{seconds}} seconds before resending the code.
auth.registro_verificacion_demasiados_reenvio: You reached the maximum number of resends. Start the registration again.
auth.registro_verificacion_pendiente_existent: There is already a pending registration for this email. Use the verification link that was already sent, or request a new code from that flow.

common.service_unavailable: The operation could not be completed right now.

session.sin_acceso: You do not have access to any organization.
session.sin_acceso_org: You do not have access to this organization.
session.persona_no_encontrada: The person linked to the session was not found.
session.org_no_encontrada: The organization does not exist or is not active.

invitacion.invalida: The invitation is invalid or has expired.
invitacion.email_no_coincide: The email does not match the invitation recipient.
invitacion.rol_invalido: The role does not belong to this organization.
invitacion.ya_existe: There is already a pending invitation for this email.
invitacion.no_disponible: The invitation is no longer available.

persona.ya_tiene_cuenta: This person already has a user account.

usuario_organizacion.ya_existe: The user already has access to this organization.

selector.subtitle: Where do you want to work today?
